title: Sci-Fi Scene Template 094
desc: Reusable sci-fi scene prompt for generating consistent visual outputs with a nostalgic and warm tone.
prompt_template: Create a {visual_style} image of {subject} in {location}. Use {lens} framing, {lighting} setup, and a {palette} color palette. Keep composition optimized for {output_format} and preserve a {mood} mood.
author: AI Image Prompt Hub Team
final_prompt: Create a photorealistic sci-fi scene image of an architect presenting a model in a coastal town. Use 50mm framing, overcast natural light, and teal and orange cinematic color treatment. Output for 4:5 social media crop while maintaining a nostalgic and warm emotional tone.
